zh.lifeSummary: 當William Everard於1480年9月出生在英國素福爾可霍爾布魯克時，他的父親Thomas Everard Esq.36歲，母親Mary Joan Cornish29歲。他與Agnes Horsfall在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1532年9月27日在他的家鄉享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: Everard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Everett  .
French (northern), Walloon, and Dutch: variant of French and Walloon   Evrard  , Dutch   Everhard  .
Americanized form of German   Eberhardt   or   Everhardt  .

variants.name: Everett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal names Everard and Everet. These might occasionally be from the Old English form of the name, Eoforheard (from eofor ‘boar’ + heard ‘hardy, brave’), but many bearers of this name were undoubtedly Normans, who took it from the cognate ancient Germanic Eburhard, Everhard.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Everard was born in September 1480, in Holbrook, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Everard Esq., was 36 and his mother, Mary Joan Cornish, was 29. He married Agnes Horsfall in Runton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 27 September 1532, in his hometown, at the age of 52.

ko.lifeSummary: William Everard(이)가 1480년 9월 영국 수폴크 홀브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Everard Esq.(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Joan Cornish(은)는 29세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 런턴에서 Agnes Horsfall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1532년 9월 27일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.
